parameters.query: SELECT id, status, gcal_event_id FROM bookings WHERE idempotency_key = $1::text LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ provider_id: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.provider_id, service_id: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.service_id, start_time: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.start_time }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ provider_id: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.provider_id, start_time: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.start_time, lock_duration_minutes: 1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ start_time: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.start_time, end_time: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.end_time || new Date(new Date($('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.start_time).getTime() + ($('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.duration_minutes || 60) * 60000).toISOString(), user_name: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.user_name || 'Paciente', service_name: 'Reserva', user_email: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.user_email || 'paciente@ejemplo.com' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ provider_id: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.provider_id, service_id: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.service_id, start_time: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.start_time, end_time: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.end_time || new Date(new Date($('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.start_time).getTime() + ($('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.duration_minutes || 60) * 60000).toISOString(), idempotency_key: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.idempotency_key, gcal_event_id: $('Create GCal Event').first()?.json?.data?.id || $('Create GCal Event').first()?.json?.id || null, user_id: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.user_id || $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.chat_id }) }}
